issues.description: Badge 1 (Corner Markers) and Badge 2 (Header Navigation) are both positioned at left:6pt, top:6pt, causing Badge 1 to be hidden behind Badge 2. Only Badge 2 is visible.
issues.suggested_fix: Move Badge 1 to a distinct position (e.g., left:6pt, top:30pt) to avoid overlap with Badge 2. This is an HTML source issue, not a conversion error.

validation.quality_notes: Conversion successful. All 8 sections (Corner Markers, Header Navigation, Hero Section, Stats Bar, Notice Board, Sidebar, Shape & Line Rendering Test, Footer) are rendered correctly. Description panel (right 275pt) is fully visible with Korean text. Wireframe palette (#000000, #808080, #E0E0E0, #FFFFFF) is correctly applied throughout. Text content is complete with no clipping or overlap. Number badges 2-8 are visible (badge 1 is overlapped by badge 2 at the same position -- this is an HTML source characteristic). Shape rendering test shows all 5 shapes and 4 line styles. Footer 4-column layout preserved. Only a minor shadow opacity warning was emitted during conversion (non-blocking). Overall layout and positioning match the original faithfully.
